content.content: Model and actress who is known for her work with Un Deux Trois fashion. She is also known for posting both runway and modeling photos through her Instagram where she has over 150,000 followers. She has walked for New York Fashion Week. She first started gaining attention through Instagram in February of 2016 by posting her professional headshots. She then walked at LA Fashion Week in March for Komava. She often shares clips of her playing soccer to her Instagram account. She has over 90,000 fans on TikTok and she has a self-titled YouTube channel where she posts a new video every week. Her brother is fellow actor and model,Walker Bryant. She was featured in the Treat Myself music video alongsideSophie FergiandPiper Rockelle.
